Notes:
  - workload coag_count=1 Z_max=0.556 n_centers=2 hints=['coagulated_reference', 'high_residue', 'contested_expression']

Anchor remains per-center; reference-field influence from Omega neighbors is normalized by (N-1) and cannot auto-coagulate. R10b coagulation reproduced via check_coagulation rule.
